arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MemoryDB snapshot.

cluster_configuration.description: A list of objects representing the configuration details of the MemoryDB cluster associated with the snapshot.

cluster_name.description: The name of the MemoryDB cluster from which the snapshot was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the MemoryDB snapshot.

kms_key_arn.description: The ARN of the AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key used to encrypt the snapshot.

source.description: The source of the snapshot, indicating where it was created.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the MemoryDB snapshot.
